svg.title: Docker bridge as an L2 switch, request flow, host interface and container IPs
svg.desc: A laptop with network interface eth0 on a bridge network at IP 172.18.0.1 sends a request to localhost:9000 that gets DNATed or proxied to 172.18.0.2:9000, the host ARPs for the container's MAC, and the kernel forwards the frame down through a highlighted docker bridge that acts like an L2 switch doing MAC-to-switchport forwarding, fanning out to three containers each showing its internal IP address.
svg.text: Host DNATs the destination, then routes it
to the container's MAC via ARP on the bridge
